title: ESP32-C3 high-side PMOS power switch
prompt: I want to cut power to a downstream 5 V load entirely with a high-side P-channel MOSFET so the load's ground stays connected. The PMOS source is on the 5 V rail, the drain feeds the load, and my ESP32-C3 GPIO controls the gate to turn the rail on. For the bench check assume the gate is pulled low so the switch is fully on.
